summary.en: Optimize a Triton vector-addition kernel for medium GPU vectors.
summary.zh: 为中等规模 GPU 向量优化 Triton 向量加法 kernel。

resource_profile.name: agentics-cuda-cu130-gb10
resource_profile.resource_description: ARM64 CUDA 13.0 profile for installing PyTorch/Triton and timing one vector-addition kernel on NVIDIA GB10.

validation_setup.reproducibility_notes: Installs uv-managed CPython 3.12 under /setup, then creates a /setup uv project environment with torch from the explicit PyTorch CUDA 13.0 index and triton from PyPI using uv sync, UV_LINK_MODE=copy, and no uv pip interface.

official_evaluation_setup.reproducibility_notes: Creates the same uv-managed CPython and /setup uv project environment for official evaluation; private benchmark config remains in the challenge bundle and is not used for dependency resolution.

metrics.name: score
metrics.label: Score
metrics.metric_description: Throughput score on a 0-100 scale, with correctness required.

metrics.name: correctness
metrics.label: Correctness
metrics.metric_description: 1 when the kernel output passes tolerance checks, otherwise 0.

metrics.name: custom_bandwidth_gbps
metrics.label: Custom Bandwidth
metrics.metric_description: Effective memory bandwidth of the submitted kernel.

metrics.name: pytorch_bandwidth_gbps
metrics.label: PyTorch Bandwidth
metrics.metric_description: Effective memory bandwidth of the PyTorch GPU baseline.

metrics.name: cpu_bandwidth_gbps
metrics.label: CPU Bandwidth
metrics.metric_description: Effective memory bandwidth of the CPU torch baseline.

metrics.name: speedup_vs_pytorch
metrics.label: Speedup vs PyTorch
metrics.metric_description: Submitted kernel bandwidth divided by PyTorch GPU baseline bandwidth.

metrics.name: custom_vs_cpu
metrics.label: Custom vs CPU
metrics.metric_description: Submitted kernel bandwidth divided by CPU baseline bandwidth.

metrics.name: pytorch_vs_cpu
metrics.label: PyTorch vs CPU
metrics.metric_description: PyTorch GPU baseline bandwidth divided by CPU baseline bandwidth.

metrics.name: max_abs_error
metrics.label: Max Absolute Error
metrics.metric_description: Maximum absolute output error observed during correctness checking.
